creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
The vym package does not install archivers/zip which is needed. 
The missing archivers/zip has to be installed manually for a functioning Vym.

Upstream has version 2.6.0 with a lot of bugfixes.
See http://www.insilmaril.de/vym/release-notes-2.6.0.html

Please upgrade the port. Thanks.
